content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array AAA of length NNN and an integer XXX.

In one operation, Chef does the following:


Find the smallest element in the current array. Let this be SSS.
Next, pick any **one** index iii such that Ai=SA_i = SAi​=S
Finally, replace AiA_iAi​ with Ai⊕XA_i \oplus XAi​⊕X
Here ⊕\oplus⊕ denotes the bitwise XOR operation.

For example, if A=[1,1,2]A = [1, 1, 2]A=[1,1,2] and X=4X = 4X=4, then in one move Chef can turn the array into either [5,1,2][5, 1, 2][5,1,2] or [1,5,2][1, 5, 2][1,5,2].

Chef performs this operation **exactly** YYY times. Let BBB be final array obtained.

Output the array BBB in sorted order. Note that under this restriction, the output is unique.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, XXX, and YYY.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers denoting the array AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output array BBB in sorted order.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 10510^5105.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case 111: The array is initially [9][9][9]. Since there is only one element, it will be modified in each step. So,

After the first operation, the array is [15][15][15] (since 9⊕6=159 \oplus 6 = 159⊕6=15)
After the second operation, the array is [9][9][9] (since 15⊕6=915 \oplus 6 = 915⊕6=9)
Continuing the above, it can be verified that after 999999 steps, the array is [15][15][15].

Test case 333: The sequence of steps is as follows:

Initially, the array is [5,10,15,20,25][5, 10, 15, 20, 25][5,10,15,20,25]
After operation 111, it is [17,10,15,20,25][17, 10, 15, 20, 25][17,10,15,20,25]
After operation 222, it is [17,30,15,20,25][17, 30, 15, 20, 25][17,30,15,20,25]
After operation 333, it is [17,30,27,20,25][17, 30, 27, 20, 25][17,30,27,20,25]
After operation 444, it is [5,30,27,20,25][5, 30, 27, 20, 25][5,30,27,20,25]
After operation 555, it is [17,30,27,20,25][17, 30, 27, 20, 25][17,30,27,20,25]
After operation 666, it is [5,30,27,20,25][5, 30, 27, 20, 25][5,30,27,20,25]

Remember to print the output in sorted order.
